requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality — Hungary
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC、无线模块及电能质量——匈牙利
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC、無線模組及電能質量——匈牙利

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Hungary should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, corporate fleet, public-sector project, motorway service area, or MEKH/DSO-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards and the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional radio spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface requirements under RED 2014/53/EU and Hungarian national implementation. Hungary's high density of automotive OEM plants (BMW Debrecen, Mercedes Kecskemét, Stellantis Esztergom, Suzuki Esztergom, Audi Győr) creates strong commercial demand for OCPP-compliant fleet and workplace charging, making OCPP interoperability a practical market requirement beyond regulatory mandate.
summary.zh: 在匈牙利，若充电点运营商、企业车队、公共部门项目、高速公路服务区或MEKH/配电系统运营商相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC、电能质量标准及欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据无线设备指令（RED 2014/53/EU）及匈牙利国家实施要求触发额外无线频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。匈牙利拥有高密度汽车OEM工厂（宝马德布雷岑、奔驰凯奇凯梅特、Stellantis埃斯泰尔戈姆、铃木埃斯泰尔戈姆、奥迪久尔），为OCPP兼容的车队和工作场所充电创造了强劲的商业需求，使OCPP互操作性成为超越监管强制要求的实际市场需求。
summary.zht: 在匈牙利，若充電點運營商、企業車隊、公共部門項目、高速公路服務區或MEKH/配電系統運營商相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC、電能品質標準及歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據無線設備指令（RED 2014/53/EU）及匈牙利國家實施要求觸發額外無線頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。匈牙利擁有高密度汽車OEM工廠（寶馬德布雷岑、賓士凱奇凱梅特、Stellantis埃斯泰爾戈姆、鈴木埃斯泰爾戈姆、奧迪久爾），為OCPP兼容的車隊和工作場所充電創造了強勁的商業需求，使OCPP互操作性成為超越監管強制要求的實際市場需求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol (version 1.6 or 2.0.1 as commonly specified by Hungarian CPOs and EU smart charging programmes)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — CE marking requirement for EV chargers
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — applicable where wireless communication modules are built in
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
NMHH (Nemzeti Média- és Hírközlési Hatóság) — Hungarian National Media and Infocommunications Authority requirements for radio spectrum and communications equipment

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment (WeChat Pay, Alipay), SIM-card integration, Chinese cloud-operator platforms, and Mandarin-language UI that need full reconfiguration for Hungarian operators, roaming, Hungarian-language interface, HUF currency, and EU data-protection requirements (GDPR).
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付方式（微信支付、支付宝）、SIM卡集成、中国云运营商平台及中文界面，需要为匈牙利运营商、漫游、匈牙利语界面、匈牙利福林（HUF）货币及欧盟数据保护要求（GDPR）进行全面重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付方式（微信支付、支付寶）、SIM卡集成、中國雲運營商平台及中文界面，需要為匈牙利運營商、漫遊、匈牙利語界面、匈牙利福林（HUF）貨幣及歐盟數據保護要求（GDPR）進行全面重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China operator-specific back-office protocols (WeChat Pay, Alipay, State Grid/Southern Grid platforms)
China radio module approvals (SRRC — State Radio Regulation of China) where applicable

gap.en: Exporters targeting Hungary must confirm the OCPP version (1.6 or 2.0.1 as required by the CPO), charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, ad-hoc payment flow (bank card, contactless per AFIR), RFID or roaming, SIM or communications module approval path under RED and NMHH, and IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality reports for the final Hungarian configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Chinese-language UI and Chinese payment integrations must be replaced with Hungarian/EU-compatible alternatives. GDPR compliance for data collected by networked chargers (user payment data, session data) must be assessed for Hungarian/EU deployment.
gap.zh: 面向匈牙利出口的厂商须确认最终匈牙利配置的OCPP版本（充电点运营商要求的1.6或2.0.1）、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、即时支付流程（AFIR要求的银行卡、非接触式支付）、RFID或漫游、依据RED和NMHH的SIM或通信模块审批路径，以及IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。中文界面和中国支付集成须替换为匈牙利/欧盟兼容方案。联网充电桩收集数据（用户支付数据、充电会话数据）的GDPR合规性须针对匈牙利/欧盟部署进行评估。
gap.zht: 面向匈牙利出口的廠商須確認最終匈牙利配置的OCPP版本（充電點運營商要求的1.6或2.0.1）、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、即時支付流程（AFIR要求的銀行卡、非接觸式支付）、RFID或漫遊、依據RED和NMHH的SIM或通訊模組審批路徑，以及IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。中文界面和中國支付集成須替換為匈牙利/歐盟兼容方案。聯網充電樁收集數據（用戶支付數據、充電會話數據）的GDPR合規性須針對匈牙利/歐盟部署進行評估。

mandatory_status.target: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is mandatory; RED 2014/53/EU applies to wireless modules; OCPP is commonly mandatory for CPO contracts and smart-charging programmes in Hungary; NMHH approval required for radio modules; GDPR applies to user data collected by networked chargers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence; SRRC radio approval is China-domestic only

source.publisher: Hungarian Energy and Public Utility Regulatory Authority (MEKH)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Hungary-bound networked EV chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, RED compliance for wireless modules with NMHH spectrum approval, EU-compatible payment flows per AFIR, Hungarian/EU-language UI, and GDPR-compliant data handling. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. Chinese payment and cloud integrations must be replaced for Hungarian deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向匈牙利的联网充电设备应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、含NMHH频谱审批的RED无线模块合规、符合AFIR的欧盟兼容支付流程、匈牙利/欧盟语言界面及GDPR合规数据处理。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。中国支付和云集成须为匈牙利部署进行替换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向匈牙利的聯網充電設備應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質、含NMHH頻譜審批的RED無線模組合規、符合AFIR的歐盟兼容支付流程、匈牙利/歐盟語言界面及GDPR合規數據處理。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。中國支付和雲集成須為匈牙利部署進行替換。
